name: Emergency: 911
description: For immediate danger, crimes in progress, fires, serious injuries, or other life-threatening emergencies in Midwest City.
hours: 24 hours daily
eligibility: Use for emergencies only.

name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
description: Free, confidential crisis support for people experiencing suicidal thoughts, mental health distress, substance-use crisis, or concern for someone else.
hours: 24 hours daily
eligibility: Anyone can call, text, or chat 988.

name: Oklahoma 988 Mental Health Lifeline / ODMHSAS
description: Oklahoma's behavioral health crisis connection for mental health and substance-use support, linked to the national 988 lifeline.
hours: 24 hours daily for 988 crisis support
eligibility: Oklahomans seeking crisis or behavioral-health support.

name: Oklahoma 211 / HeartLine
description: Free information and referral service connecting Oklahomans with health and human services, including food, shelter, utility help, and other local programs.
address: Statewide Oklahoma service; HeartLine serves central and western Oklahoma
hours: 24 hours daily
eligibility: Anyone seeking help locating community resources.

name: National Domestic Violence Hotline
description: Confidential support, safety planning, and connection to local domestic violence resources by phone, chat, or text.
hours: 24 hours daily
eligibility: People experiencing relationship abuse, concerned friends/family, and service providers.

name: Midwest City Police Department Non-Emergency
description: Non-emergency police assistance and information for matters that do not require immediate 911 response.
address: 100 N Midwest Boulevard, Midwest City, OK 73110
hours: Call or visit website for current department hours and service details.
eligibility: Midwest City residents, visitors, and businesses.

name: City of Midwest City Main Services
description: Official city entry point for municipal services, departments, utility information, permits, court, animal welfare, agendas, and contact information.
address: 100 N Midwest Boulevard, Midwest City, OK 73110
hours: Check official website for department-specific hours.
eligibility: Midwest City residents, businesses, and visitors.

name: Midwest City Utility Customer Service
description: City utility customer service for starting, stopping, transferring, and asking questions about utility services.
address: 100 N Midwest Boulevard, Midwest City, OK 73110

name: Midwest City Environmental Services
description: City information for sanitation, recycling, bulk pickup, compost, landfill, and household hazardous waste topics.
